headline: Bank Of Central Banks Top Executive Flags Stablecoins As Double-Edged Sword—Sees Faster Cross-Border Payments But Warns Of Risks
summary: Pablo Hernández de Cos, General Manager of the Bank for International Settlements, said Monday that stablecoins present both “opportunities and challenges,” urging coordinated efforts to move forward.
